subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The horizon of the world is illumined with the lights of the bounty of the Most Great Name, and from the grace of the Kingdom of the Ancient Beauty all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله افق عالم بانوار عنایت اسم اعظم روشن و از فیض ملکوت جمال قدم جمیع
